description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, rectangular footprint. The front features a landscaped entryway with two prominent trees and a wide staircase leading to the main entrance. The rear of the bungalow includes a swimming pool, patio area with outdoor seating, and a covered veranda, suggesting a focus on outdoor leisure. The side yards are landscaped with additional trees and green spaces, while the property is bordered by a low fence. Several outbuildings and structures, such as a water tank and a small shed, are present near the rear and side of the main building. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with large glass panels providing ample natural light.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with landscaped gardens, a swimming pool, and multiple outdoor leisure areas. The structure features large windows, a wide front entry, and several outbuildings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped walkway, and two large trees flanking the entry.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green yard, additional trees, and the swimming pool area at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, covered veranda, and outbuildings including a water tank.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the green yard, side structures, and the rear leisure area.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
